productDisplayName: Citizen Men Black Dial Eco-Drive Watch
description: It starts with a simple, yet revolutionary concept: a watch that never needs a battery. citizen Eco-Drive technology harnesses the power of light - from any natural or artificial light source - and converts it into energy which is stored in a permanently rechargeable lithium-ion cell. It recharges continuously in any kind of light to run forever. So choose this watch for the ultimate convenience and to indulge your love for anything high-tech!Case diameter: 39 mmCase thickness: 5 mmDial shape: RoundInternational Warranty: 1 yearWarranty in India: 3 years 3 months 3 daysStainless steel round case with a black bezelSteel strap with a butterfly claspBlack dial with white and metallic handsBranding on the dialScrew to reset timeDate aperture on the dialEco-DriveSolid case back made of stainless steel for enhanced durabilityWater resistance up to 100 metres, wearable around sinks, during swimming, poolside diving but not highboard diving and surfing
